title: anthospermum galioides subsp. galioides
intro: Anthospermum galioides subsp. galioides, also known as the "Wart-plant" or "Wartweed", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Anthospermum galioides subsp. galioides include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of malaria. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and has been used in traditional African medicine for centuries.
